title: Cron-Capable Disposable User
objective: A disposable OpenClaw user state used to register and trigger a short-lived cron run through OpenClaw's real cron command path.
setupEvidence: cron CLI can read gateway config
artifact dir captures cron command transcripts
cleanupGuarantees: cron entries created by the scenario are delete-after-run and explicitly removed during helper cleanup
disposable env cleanup removes any remaining cron state
